description: Your organization is preparing for an ISO 27001 compliance audit, and the auditor requires evidence that the 'No Shared Accounts' policy is technically enforced. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!), implement a continuous detection pipeline to identify users logging in from multiple distinct IP addresses. Define an Event Type named 'successful_auth' for successful SSH authentications within the 'security_logs' index. Configure a scheduled alert named 'Shared_Credential_Violation' that identifies users authenticating from three or more distinct source IP addresses. Additionally, create a dashboard named 'IAM_Security_Posture' containing at least two panels, including one for the alert results and another visualizing login volume over time.
